title: VPlusPandora
description: This modpack aims to provide a Vanilla Plus Minecraft experience.
body:
By adding new features to vanilla minecraft, Vanilla aims to create a better experience without breaking the vanilla vibe.

Includes some mods from [LieOn Studios](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieon-studios) and [pnku](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku).

Includes [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) mod customized to fit the Minecraft vanilla vibe.

Extra Decoration Mods
- 
- [Better Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-furniture)
- [Beautify](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated)
- [Hollow](https://modrinth.com/mod/hollow)
- [Sooty Chimneys](https://modrinth.com/mod/sooty-chimneys)
- [Horizontal Glass Panes](https://modrinth.com/mod/horizontal-glass-panes)

Storage Mods
- [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)

If you want to see other mods, you can click on the relevant version on the version page and go to dependencies.

I'm adding Turkish translation to the mods, but it's not completely finished right now.
